CustomValues.Text: primary secondary - theme_color_1 theme_color_2 theme_color_3 theme_color_4 theme_color_5 - postit_color_1 postit_color_2 postit_color_3 postit_color_4 postit_color_5 - interaction success fail - danger information warning - gamification_gold gamification_silver gamification_bronze - color_block_divider - button_background button_foreground button_hover_background button_hover_foreground - black white transparent
